summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was inferred; each open PR remains independently scoped and should stay open for maintainer or author follow-up rather than closeout.

actions.reason: Focused channel bug-fix PR with proof and passing relevant checks; no duplicate/superseding evidence and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Substantial channel behavior PR needing maintainer technical review; no closure basis and no shared canonical.
Session-state fix has useful implementation and proof, but failing checks and technical correctness risk block merge/fixed-by-candidate handling; no closeout basis.
Feature/configuration PR is independently scoped and needs maintainer product and technical judgment; failing checks block merge and there is no closure evidence.
Open contributor PR with useful code and an active waiting-on-author state; no duplicate, supersession, or low-signal closeout evidence.
